error_signature: only returns the first tab from Google Doc
title: Google Docs node only returns first tab content
symptom: When using the Google Docs node in n8n, it only retrieves content from the 'Notes' tab and not from the 'Transcript' tab.
not_this_if: Only one tab exists in the document
Using a different method to access the document
root_cause: The Google Docs node in n8n does not include content from all tabs by default. The parameter 'includeTabsContent' is disabled, which prevents retrieval of content from tabs other than the first one.
fix_steps: Open the Google Docs node settings
Add the query parameter 'includeTabsContent' and set it to true
Execute the workflow again to retrieve all tab contents
agent_instruction: Enable the 'includeTabsContent' parameter in the Google Docs node settings to access all tabs.
